message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
Phase 2 High Priority Fixes:

1. Replace hardcoded colors in staff-app components:
   - Find '#E31C5F' → colors.primary
   - Find '#00A699' → colors.success
   - Find '#FF5A5F' → colors.error
   - Find '#F5A623' → colors.warning
   - Find '#FFFFFF' → colors.white
   - Find '#F7F7F7' → colors.inputBackground
   - Find '#333333' → colors.text

2. Add inline form validation to these files:
   - staff-app/src/app/(tabs)/edit-profile.tsx
   - staff-app/src/components/LeaveApplicationModal.tsx
   - staff-app/src/app/(tabs)/homework.tsx
   Replace Alert.alert() errors with inline error messages

3. Update tasks #11 and #14 to completed when done.
</teammate-message>

                  </View>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.resetButton]}
                    onPress={resetAttendance}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Reset Attendance"
                  >
                    <Ionicons name="refresh-outline" size={16} color={colors.textSecondary} style={styles.resetButtonIcon} />
                    <Text style={styles.resetButtonText}>Reset Attendance</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                </>
              ) : (
                <View style={styles.attendanceActions}>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.attendanceButton, styles.presentButton]}
                    onPress={() => markAttendance('present')}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Mark Present"
                  >
                    <Ionicons name="checkmark" size={18} color={colors.white} style={styles.buttonIcon} />
                    <Text style={styles.attendanceButtonText}>Mark Present</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.attendanceButton, styles.absentButton]}
                    onPress={() => markAttendance('absent')}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Mark Absent"
                  >
                    <Ionicons name="close" size={18} color={colors.white} style={styles.buttonIcon} />
                    <Text style={styles.attendanceButtonText}>Mark Absent</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                </View>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>

          {/* Class Teacher Section */}
          {data.classTeacher && (

                  </View>

                    <Text style={[styles.className, { color: colors.text }]}>{data.classTeacher.name}</Text>
                    <Text style={[styles.classSection, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>Section {data.classTeacher.section}</Text>
